article_title: B.C. Reg. 202/2025 – British Columbia Securities Commission

briefs.title: BC Securities Commission extends shelf prospectus validity to 37 months for major public issuers
briefs.summary: BC amended its securities rules so that large, established public companies (called 'well-known seasoned issuers') can keep a shelf prospectus (a pre-approved document to raise money from investors) valid for 37 months in Ontario, up from the standard period.
briefs.article_title: B.C. Reg. 202/2025 – British Columbia Securities Commission
